title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE WAKAS BARRIO SCHOOL IN THE BARRIO OF WAKAS, MUNICIPALITY OF KAWIT, PROVINCE OF CAVITE, TO GENERAL TOMAS MASCARDO MEMORIAL SCHOOL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 3187 / 57 OG No. 7, 1190 (February 13, 1961)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2794, June 19, 1960 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE WAKAS BARRIO SCHOOL IN THE BARRIO OF WAKAS, MUNICIPALITY OF KAWIT, PROVINCE OF CAVITE, TO GENERAL TOMAS MASCARDO MEMORIAL SCHOOL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Wakas Barrio School in the barrio of Wakas, Municipality of Kawit, Province of Cavite, is hereby changed to General Tomas Mascardo Memorial School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 19, 1960.
